summary: Excellent soundboard capture of the 8/5/67 show, highlighted by the first known performance of TIFTOO and a beloved Morning Dew.
review: Both reviewers rave about this historic recording, praising the banter and noting that it contains the first known rendition of TIFTOO as well as one of their favorite versions of Morning Dew. The lack of any technical complaints suggests a clean soundboard source, making the performance both musically and sonically enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews highlight an exceptional show and imply high‑quality soundboard audio, but the small sample size limits confidence to medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No technical issues mentioned; reviewers imply a clear, well‑balanced capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Positive remarks about great banter and the flow of the set, especially the early appearance of TIFTOO and a standout Morning Dew.
